Package jline.api

package jline.api
This package contains most algorithms for solving stochastic models
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CACHE
    APIs for stochastic models of caches
    CACHE.cacheGammaLpReturn
     
    CACHE.cacheMVAReturn
     
    CACHE.cacheXiFpReturn
     
    CTMC
    APIs for Continuous-Time Markov Chains (CTMCs).
    DTMC
    APIs for Discrete-Time Markov Chains (DTMCs).
    FJ
    API for the methods used to deal with fork-join (FJ) systems in the MVA solver.
    FJ.FJApproxReturn
     
    FJ.FJsortForksReturn
     
    MAM
    APIs for Matrix-Analytic Methods and Markovian Arrival Processes (MAPs).
    NPFQN
    APIs for approximating non-product-form queueing networks
    NPFQN.npfqnNonexpApproxReturn
     
    PFQN
    APIs for evaluating Product-Form Queueing Networks.
    PFQN.pfqnBSReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnComomrmReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnFncReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnGldIndex
    Auxiliary class used to index interim results in pfqn_gld
    PFQN.pfqnLinearizerCoreReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnLinearizerEstimateReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnLinearizerForwardMVAReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnLinearizerMSCoreReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnLinearizerMSEstimateReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnLinearizerMSForwardMVAReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnLinearizerMSReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnLinearizerReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnMVALDMXECReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnMVALDMXReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnMVALDReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnMVAReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnNcComplexReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnNcReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnNcSanitizeReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnNcXQReturn
     
    PFQN.pfqnRdReturn
     
    SN
    APIs for macros to process NetworkStruct objects

    SN.snGetDemandsChainReturn
